writing.title: Writing Task 2: Review — An achievement story
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) about an achievement, combining Present Perfect (experience, ever/never, already/just/yet, since/for) and Passive Voice from Chương 8.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have already finished my first book. I started it two years ago, and I have worked on it since I was in university. It has just been published last month by a small publishing company.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 8
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Warn about consequences
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) warning about consequences, using Conditional 1 (If + Present Simple, will).
writing.sampleAnswer: If you don't wear a helmet, you will get a fine. If we follow the safety rules, there will be fewer accidents. If the company breaks this regulation, it will face a penalty.
checklist: Dùng If + Present Simple đúng dạng
Dùng will + V trong mệnh đề kết quả
Có ít nhất 2 cảnh báo/quy định khác nhau
